<?php namespace Cviebrock\EloquentSluggable\Tests\Models; use Cviebrock\EloquentSluggable\SluggableScopeHelpers; /** * Class PostShortConfigWithScopeHelpers. */ class PostShortConfigWithScopeHelpers extends Post { use SluggableScopeHelpers; /** * Return the sluggable configuration array for this model. */ public function sluggable(): array { return [ 'slug_field', ]; } }
